raw: Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date. Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 6 people at 50% off per person (children under 3 always free). Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount. -Pass is valid for $20 off a Family Membership or $10 off an Individual or Participating Membership purchase by the user. THIS PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO THE MORSE INSTITUTE LIBRARY BY 9:30AM THE DAY AFTER YOUR RESERVATION. OVERDUE FINES ARE $3/DAY. Passes can be returned at the circulation desk or the outside book drops.
